title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.030 - Section 537.010 not to extend to what action
text:
537.030.  Section 537.010 not to extend to what action. — Sections 537.010 and 537.020 shall not extend to actions for slander, libel, assault and battery or false imprisonment.
(RSMo 1939 § 99, A. 1949 H.B. 2135) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 99; 1919 § 98; 1909 § 106
